specific_question: Did Elexion Automotive introduce a formal certification for infotainment systems?
answer: Yes, in early 2025, Elexion Automotive, after disclosing its plan publicly, launched its Dealer Knowledge Certification program to ensure sales and service staff achieve uniform expertise on infotainment and connectivity systems.
dr_question: What impact would a 20% increase in dealer-led customer education on EV infotainment and connectivity features have on reducing service visit frequency by 2027?
